title: Buttery Creamy Dutch Chicken Roast
description: A hearty and flavorful Dutch-inspired dish featuring roasted chicken, buttery creamy sauce, and a hint of chilli powder, perfect for a post-workout meal. This recipe is low-calorie-friendly and can be prepared in under an hour.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together chilli powder, paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Rub the spice mixture all over the chicken breast, making sure to coat it evenly.
Place the chicken breast on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and roast in the oven for 25-30 minutes or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, melt the butter in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the low-fat cream to the saucepan and stir until the mixture is smooth and creamy.
Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it into thin strips.
Add the sliced chicken to the creamy sauce and stir to coat.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the top of the chicken and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the chicken hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
